differential_diagnoses: Major depressive disorder with peripartum onset
next_steps: Establish safety plan and conduct formal assessment for immediate risk of harm to self or infant
Initiate or optimize evidence-based treatment for postpartum depression and OCD (e.g., SSRI dose adjustment or augmentation)
Initiate specialized cognitive behavioral therapy, specifically exposure and response prevention (ERP)
Provide psychoeducation and supportive therapy to reduce shame and fear of losing custody
Coordinate care with a multidisciplinary team including psychiatry, obstetrics, and pediatrics
Monitor for evolution of symptoms toward postpartum psychosis, characterized by loss of reality testing
Support patient in gradually re-engaging with infant care with supervision as clinically indicated
